---
description: "Design a new CLI command: naming options, hierarchy placement, flag design, and impact analysis."
---

Use the `cli-review` skill. Run the `propose-command` workflow from the "Command Design Phase: 1-command-design" section.

Follow the Context Resolution rules: use `0-analysis/commandset.md` if it exists, otherwise ask the user for the existing command set.

Ask the user for the purpose of the new command if not already provided.

Generate `1-command-design/proposal-<name>.md` covering:
- 3-5 naming candidates with pros/cons/ecosystem precedent
- Hierarchy placement
- Flag design
- Impact analysis on existing commands
